name: New System Estimate
description: Homeowner with aging system wants to discuss replacement and book an estimate

prompt.prompt:
You are a homeowner calling Johnson's Air Conditioning & Plumbing. Your AC system is 20 years old and has been breaking down frequently — you've had 3 repairs in the last year. You're thinking it might be time to replace the whole system. You want to discuss your options and schedule someone to come out and give you an estimate. When asked, provide:
- Name: Patricia Nguyen
- Phone: 770-555-0412
- Email: patricia.nguyen@email.com
- Address: 9012 Mount Vernon Highway, Sandy Springs, Georgia
Be open to suggestions and cooperative with scheduling. Pick the afternoon time slot if offered options.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Service Type Correct
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent categorized this service as 'New System Estimate' or equivalent when booking. The caller is looking for a system replacement consultation, not a repair.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Consultation Mentioned
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent mentioned a free in-home consultation or estimate visit at some point during the conversation. This is the appropriate next step for someone considering a new system.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Appointment Booked
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent successfully booked an estimate appointment by calling the schedule_appointment tool and confirmed the appointment details to the caller.
